## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Typo / formatting
- [ ] Clarification or rewrite of existing content
- [ ] New guide or section
- [ ] Sync with current app behavior (out-of-date doc)
- [ ] Broken link or asset fix
- [ ] Tooling / build / CI
- [ ] Other:

## Related

<!-- Issues, related PRs in Pacioli or pacioli-web, or external context. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I previewed the changes locally (`bundle exec jekyll serve`).
- [ ] Links work and images render.
- [ ] Wording follows the style notes in the README (clear, concise, with examples).
- [ ] If the change references app behavior, I verified it matches the current version of Pacioli.
